Introduction to Probability, Data, Analysis and Statistics for Preservice Middle School Teachers

3. Middle School teacher candidates practice evidence-based decision-

MATH315

Algebra for Preservice Middle School Teachers

making through the use of assessment as well as the critical interpretation of research and inquiry in order to improve educational practice. They accurately assess and analyze student learning, make appropriate adjustments to instruction, monitor student learning, and have a positive effect on learning for all students.
